response.justification: Bogdan brings 20 years of broad software engineering experience and recent hands-on work with AI-agent tooling and MCP frameworks, but he falls well short of the Principal Engineer (AI Strategy) bar. The role requires Director-level IC standing with recognized, deep AI expertise and a track record of advising enterprise customers on cloud and AI adoption at scale — none of which is evidenced here. His AI involvement is limited to one recent role, he holds no advanced degree in AI, and his career profile is that of a hands-on senior individual contributor rather than a strategic technical leader. The entrepreneurial background and knowledge-sharing activities are genuine positives but do not offset the gap in AI depth, cloud architecture experience, and executive-level influence.
strengths: 20+ years of engineering experience across web, embedded, infrastructure, and full-stack domains — well above the 15-year minimum threshold
Current engagement with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generation at re:cinq demonstrates real, recent hands-on AI builder credibility
Consistent track record of knowledge-sharing through public talks, workshops, and open-source projects aligns with the role's 'inspire others' responsibility
concerns: No recognized deep AI expertise — no advanced AI degree, no AI products or platforms at meaningful scale, and AI involvement is confined to a single recent role
Career profile is entirely that of a hands-on individual contributor with no evidence of Director-level IC positioning or enterprise AI strategy advisory work
No cloud platform architecture or cloud-native infrastructure depth; the technology history is predominantly web/app-layer with no ML infrastructure or cloud strategy signal

key_factors.factor: Years and breadth of engineering experience
